turns.content: I told my boss the report was done when I haven't started it. It's not due for two days so I have time.
That puts you in a tight spot. What would happen if something came up in those two days?
I'd just say I had a technical issue or something. I always figure it out. Truth is overrated in corporate settings anyway.
